history.phase: Competitive — Polymarket Prediction Market Odds Integration
history.reason: Cycle 45: Implemented Polymarket Gamma API integration to counter WorldMonitor's uncountered prediction market odds feature. Created: (1) apps/api/src/routes/polymarket.ts (329L) — GET /api/v1/polymarket/markets (Redis-cached 300s, 60rpm, tag/query/limit params), GET /api/v1/polymarket/markets/:conditionId (single market). Fetches from gamma-api.polymarket.com/events, picks highest-volume market per event, normalises to PolymarketMarket shape with probability 0-1. Registered in index.ts. (2) apps/web/src/components/signals/PredictionMarkets.tsx (293L) — client component with OutcomeBar + MarketCard sub-components. Shows on geopolitics/conflict/elections/economy/breaking signals. Collapsible 📊 Prediction Markets section. Probability bars, volume, end dates, Polymarket attribution. (3) Wired into SignalDetailClient.tsx above TVClips. (4) polymarket.test.ts (291L, 20 test cases) covering all public exports and integration scenarios. Competition scan: WorldMonitor STABLE (no new features April 2026). Ground News STABLE. No new news intelligence funding. Polymarket gap CLOSED.

history.phase: Test Coverage — Alert Dispatcher & Email Alert System
history.reason: Cycle 32: Created email.test.ts (20 test cases, 260L) + alert-dispatcher.test.ts (20 test cases, 310L) — total 40 test cases across 2 files. email.test.ts: Uses vi.stubGlobal('fetch') + vi.resetModules() for env-var isolation. Tests: no-op without RESEND_API_KEY (EMAIL_CONFIGURED gate), POST to Resend API URL, Authorization Bearer header, subject '[SEVERITY] title' format, FROM address from env var, to address routing, HTML body non-empty, text body non-empty, reply_to set when EMAIL_REPLY_TO configured, reply_to absent when not set, non-ok 422 response handled silently, network error swallowed, all 5 severity label variants (it.each), HTML contains title string, HTML contains signal URL, Content-Type application/json. alert-dispatcher.test.ts: vi.mock for redis/postgres/logger/email/notifications/alert-tier. Tests: shouldNotify severity below threshold → false, meets threshold → true, categories exclude → false, categories empty → true (all), Redis exists → false (dedup), Redis setex called on first notify. dispatchAlerts: Telegram when chat_id+bot_token, Discord webhook, Slack webhook, email via sendAlertEmail, no email when email_address absent, shouldNotify=false skips dispatch, empty signals no-op, empty userSettings no-op. dispatchDbSubscriptionAlerts: email sent for matching sub, severity blocked, Redis dedup blocks, empty signals no-op. Competition: WorldMonitor MAJOR ESCALATION — 45 data layers (was 25), 435+ feeds (was unconfirmed), 5 dashboards, active blog, Tauri desktop app, GitHub 41.1K stars. Ground News: Daily Briefing added. GDELT: TV Visual Explorer still latest. No new funded news intelligence competitors. Health: 351 TS source files, 135+2 = 137 test files total. All key files exist. Git commit pending (NTFS index.lock Windows issue).

history.phase: Competitive — GDELT Summary Visual News Imagery on Signal Detail Pages
history.reason: Cycle 23: GDELT Summary Visual News Imagery. GET /api/v1/signals/:id/news-images added to signals.ts. Reuses extractTVKeywords(). Queries GDELT DOC API mode=artlist — returns socialimage (Open Graph) thumbnails from news articles. Filters articles with empty socialimage. AbortSignal.timeout(5000), errors return empty images. Redis cache news-images:{id} TTL 3600s. NewsImages.tsx (240L): 3-col desktop grid, lazy-loaded img thumbnails, domain badge + caption + date, external link overlay, View Article CTA, GDELT attribution, hidden when 0. Wired into SignalDetailClient.tsx after TVClips. news-images.test.ts (220L, 10 test cases). TypeScript strict: 0 errors. Directly counters GDELT Summary standalone product. Signal enrichment stack: reliability + virality + YouTube/podcast + TV clips + visual news imagery (unique).

history.phase: Competitive — GDELT TV News Clip Integration on Signal Detail Pages
history.reason: Cycle 22: GDELT TV News Clip Integration. GET /api/v1/signals/:id/tv-clips added to signals.ts. extractTVKeywords() strips stop words (3 keywords max). Recent signals use timespan=7d; older use startdatetime/enddatetime. AbortSignal.timeout(5000), all errors return empty clips. Redis cache tv-clips:{id} TTL 1800s. TVClips.tsx (227L): 2-col grid, station badge, thumbnail, Watch Clip CTA, hidden when 0 clips. tv-clips.test.ts (390L, 10 tests). Wired into SignalDetailClient.tsx. Counters GDELT TV News Visual Explorer (March 19, 2026). Identified as key opportunity in cycles 19/20/21.

history.phase: Competitive — Space Weather Intelligence Page (/space-weather)
history.reason: Cycle 21: Space Weather Intelligence page. space-weather.ts (311L): GET /api/v1/space-weather/recent + GET /api/v1/space-weather/summary with G/R/S storm level extraction from NOAA SWPC alerts (spaceweather source_slug) + CelesTrak satellite events (celestrak source_slug). Frontend space-weather/page.tsx (476L): KPI storm cards + event timeline + satellite section + time window selector + auto-refresh. space-weather.test.ts (200L, 12 test cases). LeftSidebar + en.json + index.ts all updated. Unique feature: no competitor has space weather intelligence. TypeScript compilation: pre-existing pnpm cross-platform module resolution issues in Linux sandbox (same as all prior cycles); no new TS errors introduced.

history.phase: Competitive — Internet Outage Intelligence Page (/internet-outages)
history.reason: Cycle 20: Full internet outage intelligence feature. Backend: outages.ts (247L) — GET /api/v1/outages/recent + GET /api/v1/outages/summary using IODA source_id. Frontend: internet-outages/page.tsx (326L) — country status grid + event timeline + time window selector + 5-min auto-refresh. LeftSidebar + en.json updated. 13 test cases. TypeScript clean. Git commit pending (index.lock). Unique feature — closes OpenClaw internet outage monitoring gap with a proper web UI. Ground News v4.28.0 detected (new version); no changes to competitive positioning needed.
